{
  "claim_texts": [
    "SB 672 would expand parole opportunity to those convicted of murder with specified 'special circumstances' if they committed their crime between the ages of 18 and 26.",
    "SB 672 would open the door to parole for an estimated 1,600 individuals convicted of violent crimes.",
    "This includes individuals who killed based on religion or race, those with previous murder convictions, mass killers, bombers, drive-by shooters, and gang members.",
    "Senate Republicans unanimously opposed SB 672, viewing it as detrimental to public safety.",
    "Some individuals impacted by SB 672 include those who have committed planned murders with special circumstances."
  ]
